name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery
EXTENDS Integers
VARIABLES num, flag
Init == /\ num = 0
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: flag[i] = FALSE
Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ flag[i] = TRUE
          /\ LET maxNum == CHOOSE m \in 1..N: num[m] = MAX(\E j \in 1..N: num[j])
              IN num' = IF i = maxNum + 1 THEN num + 1 ELSE num
          /\ \A j \in 1..N: j # i => flag[j] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>
Spec == \A i \in 1..N: \A j \in 1..N: j # i => (num[i] < num[j]) \/ (num[i] = num[j] /\ i < j)
====

name: Raft Leader Election

---- MODULE LeaderElection
CONSTANTS NULL
VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
          /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..n |-> NULL]
          /\ state = [i \in 1..n |-> "Follower"]
Next == \/ \exists i \in 1..n: /\ state[i] = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
      \/ \exists i \in 1..n: /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = [i \in 1..n |-> NULL]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Leader"]
      \/ \exists i \in 1..n: /\ state[i] = "Leader"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = state
      \/ \exists i \in 1..n: /\ state[i] = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = state
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
====

---- MODULE ReliableSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
VARIABLES sent, retransmitCount
Init == sent = {} /\ retransmitCount = 0
Next == sent' = sent \cup {chunk} /\ retransmitCount' = 0
           \/ chunk \notin sent /\ sent' = sent \cup {chunk} /\ retransmitCount' = 0
           \/ chunk \in sent /\ sent' = sent /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, retransmitCount>>
TypeOK == TypeOK == /\ sent \in SUBSET(1..MAX_CHUNKS)
          /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
====

name: Simple Allocator

---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
CONSTANT N, Client, Pages
VARIABLE free, allocated
Init == free = {1..N} /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]
Next == /\ free' = free \ {p}
          \/ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
          \/ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \setminus {p}]
          /\ free' = free
          /\ allocated' = allocated
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>$

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers, Publishers, Messages, SUBSCRIBERS
VARIABLES state, messages
TypeOK == /\ state \in SUBSCRIBERS \/ state \in Topics
Init == /\ state = Subscribers
Next == /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] |-> IF p \in Topics THEN messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![p] |-> Append(messages[p], [publisher |-> CHOOSE pub \in Publishers: pub, message |-> CHOOSE msg \in Messages: msg]) ELSE messages' = messages]
Spec == /\ Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, messages>>
---- END OF MODULE ----
====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter
EXTENDS Integers
CONSTANTS Node
VARIABLES counts
Init == counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
Next == \/ n \in Node
          \/ m \in Node
              \/ m = n
                  \/ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
              \/
                  \/ m /= n
                      \/ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = counts[n][m]]
          \/
          \/ m \notin Node
              \/ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = counts[n]]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts
